items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays tributes to Babu Jagjivan Ram on his birth anniversary
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays tributes to Babu Jagjivan Ram on his birth anniversary Babu Jagjivan Ram dedicated his entire life to the service of the nation and social justice His struggle for the rights of the weaker and underprivileged sections of society will continue to inspire us Posted On: 05 APR 2026 1…

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings on National Maritime Day
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings on National Maritime Day Your professionalism and courage have played a crucial role in steering the nation’s growth Posted On: 05 APR 2026 12:57PM by PIB Delhi Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah extended his greetings to the personnel of …
